title: althenia cylindrocarpa
intro:
Althenia cylindrocarpa, also known as the cylindrical spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae, native to tropical regions in Central and South America.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Althenia cylindrocarpa include treating various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as promoting urinary health and digestion. Herbal preparations of Althenia cylindrocarpa can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and applications.
